description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a matte black fixed stock and a long, cylindrical barrel. The receiver and magazine are rendered in a metallic gray, contrasting with the darker polymer components. The handguard is elongated and black, providing a comfortable grip area, while the front sight post is triangular and sits just behind the muzzle. The magazine is detachable and box-shaped, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The overall silhouette is streamlined, with minimal external attachments, making it suitable for both urban and tactical environments.
description: A streamlined rifle with a black fixed stock, metallic gray receiver, and a long black barrel, featuring a detachable box magazine and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, receiver, handguard, and barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard, with the front sight post visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the fixed stock, receiver, and magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear-on view displaying the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and handguard.
